exclude-dirs.description: Subdirectories to exclude when searching for configuration files

file-types.description: File types to validate (cannot be used with exclude-file-types)

depth.description: Depth of recursion for search paths. 0 disables recursion.

reporter.description: Report formats and optional output paths. Format: type or type:path

groupby.description: Group output by filetype, directory, pass-fail, or error-type

require-schema.description: Fail validation if a file supports schema validation but does not declare a schema

no-schema.description: Disable all schema validation. Only syntax is checked.

schemastore.description: Enable automatic schema lookup using the SchemaStore catalog

schemastore-path.description: Path to a local SchemaStore clone. Implies schemastore = true.

globbing.description: Enable glob pattern matching for search paths

gitignore.description: Skip files and directories matched by .gitignore patterns

schema-map.description: Map glob patterns to schema files. Keys are patterns, values are schema paths.

type-map.description: Map glob patterns to file types. Keys are patterns, values are type names.

delimiter.description: Field delimiter character. Default: comma. Use \t for tab.

comment.description: Comment character. Lines starting with this character are ignored.

lazy-quotes.description: If true, a quote may appear in an unquoted field and a non-doubled quote may appear in a quoted field.

forbid-duplicate-keys.description: If true, duplicate keys in objects are reported as errors. Default: false.
If true, duplicate keys within the same section are reported as errors. Default: false.
